description.en: List all cloud agents for the authenticated user. Retrieve agent status, repository information, and pull request details.
description.de: Liste alle Cloud-Agenten für den authentifizierten Benutzer. Abrufen von Agenten-Status, Repository-Informationen und Pull-Request-Details.
description.es: List all cloud agents for the authenticated user. Retrieve agent status, repository information, and pull request details.
description.fr: List all cloud agents for the authenticated user. Retrieve agent status, repository information, and pull request details.
description.ro: List all cloud agents for the authenticated user. Retrieve agent status, repository information, and pull request details.
description.it: List all cloud agents for the authenticated user. Retrieve agent status, repository information, and pull request details.

vars.API_KEY: env:CURSOR_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cursor Dashboard at https://cursor.com/settings/api
